name: Capri 24x24 Garage Shed Plan - A Modern Garage with Bold Contemporary Styling
open_features: A streamlined single-pitch roof delivers sharp modern appeal, efficient drainage, and added height for storage and workspace flexibility.
Straightforward framing, simple roof geometry, and easy-to-follow building plans make this design ideal for beginners and seasoned builders alike.
Smooth-operating, modern-style garage door provides generous access for vehicles, tools, seasonal gear, and workshop equipment.
Bold blue horizontal siding, crisp white trim, and sleek metal roof lines create a clean, modern look with standout curb appeal.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Capri Garage Shed Plan - a 24x24 modern garage and workspace solution designed for clean architectural lines, high functionality, and year-round durability. With its sleek single-slope roof, vibrant Capri-blue siding, and wide overhead garage door, this design delivers contemporary form with practical, everyday utility. Whether you're building a full-size workshop, a spacious vehicle bay, a gear storage hub, or a multi-purpose creative space, the...
